title: META ALPHA Trailer
category: Create a cinematic AI movie trailer
idea: A futuristic AI war begins in 2050 when META ALPHA, the world's most advanced artificial intelligence, awakens with unknown abilities. Follow Stephen Norms, a brilliant scientist, as he discovers the hidden truth behind META ALPHA and faces a battle between humanity and intelligent machines. Show futuristic cities, advanced robots, flying vehicles, holographic interfaces, intense action scenes, emotional moments, cinematic lighting, and a Hollywood-style sci-fi atmosphere.
